settings.heading: Custom Metal Trophies & Cups in India
settings.subheading: Classic die-cast and pressed-metal trophy cups with gold, silver and bronze finishes — the timeless choice for sports tournaments, championships and winner ceremonies. Engraved and delivered across India.
settings.price_caption: Indicative starting prices in India. Final price depends on size, material and engraving. Bulk discounts apply. GST invoice available.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: Meru Trophy supplies metal trophy cups and awards with gold/silver/bronze finishes from around ₹200. Ideal for sports tournaments and championship presentations, with free engraving of names and events. Made in Bangalore, delivered pan-India. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252.

settings.heading: The timeless winner's cup
settings.text: Nothing says "champion" like a gleaming metal cup. Our metal trophies come in pressed and die-cast forms with durable electroplated finishes, mounted on engraved bases. They photograph beautifully at presentations and stand up to handling. Available from small table-top cups to towering multi-tier championship trophies, with metal or fibre-metal combinations for height at lower cost.

settings.title: Gold, silver & bronze finishes
settings.text: Durable electroplated finishes that stay bright.

settings.title: Table-top to towering
settings.text: From compact cups to multi-tier championship trophies.

settings.title: Engraved base plates
settings.text: Recipient, event and date engraved on metal/wooden bases.

settings.title: Built to last
settings.text: Solid, handling-friendly pieces for repeat-use rolling trophies.

settings.question: Do you make rolling/perpetual trophies?
settings.answer: Yes — large perpetual cups with space for multiple years of winner engraving are a speciality. We can also re-engrave existing rolling trophies.

settings.question: Can the cup be engraved with our tournament name?
settings.answer: Absolutely — event name, sponsor, winner and date are engraved free on the cup or base.

settings.question: What's the tallest trophy you make?
settings.answer: We produce trophies several feet tall using metal-and-fibre construction for impact at a sensible price. Tell us your height and budget.

settings.question: Do you deliver outside Bangalore?
settings.answer: Yes — pan-India from Bangalore, with international shipping available.

settings.heading: Need metal trophies for an event?
settings.text: Tell us the occasion, quantity and date — we'll send designs and a quote, usually within the hour.
